name: Side Street Inn
tagline: Where Honolulu chefs eat on their day off — the fried rice feeds four and costs sixteen bucks.
mustOrder: pan-fried pork chops ($16–20, THE signature dish)
talkStory: Founded by Colin Nishida, James Beard semifinalist and one of Hawaii's most respected chefs.
insiderTips: After Honolulu's best chefs close their own restaurants at 10–11pm, they come here for Colin's pork chops and cold beer. Order family-style — 3–4 dishes for 2 people, split everything. Go late night (after 10pm) for the authentic chef crowd.
